Tool.TransformGizmoTool.Default.Tooltip: Enables the default mode of the tool, used to select objects.
Tool.TransformGizmoTool.Move.Tooltip: Enables the Move mode, allowing you to move objects using the gizmo handles.
Tool.TransformGizmoTool.Rotate.Tooltip: Enables the Rotate mode, allowing you to rotate objects using the gizmo handles.
Tool.TransformGizmoTool.Scale.Tooltip: Enables the Scale mode, allowing you to resize objects using the gizmo handles.
Tool.TransformGizmoTool.FollowGround.too: When enabled, the object follows the ground surface, maintaining its height offset relative to the terrain.
Tool.TransformGizmoTool.SnapOnGround.too: Snap the object to the ground, setting its Y position to match the terrain surface below.
TransformPanel.PAST_POS_X: Paste the position, only the X axis.
TransformPanel.PAST_POS_Y: Paste the position, only the Y axis.
TransformPanel.PAST_POS_Z: Paste the position, only the Z axis.
TransformPanel.LOCALAXIS: Enable local axis modification instead of global axis. The axes follow the object's Y rotation, with the X axis always pointing forward relative to the object.
TransformPanel.POS_I: Position step increment. Scroll or edit the input to change it.
TransformPanel.POS_X: X position (global axis). Scroll up/down to change the value.
TransformPanel.POS_Y: Y position (global axis). Scroll up/down to change the value.
TransformPanel.POS_Z: Z position (global axis). Scroll up/down to change the value.
TransformPanel.PAST_ROT_X: Paste the rotation, only the X axis.
TransformPanel.PAST_ROT_Y: Paste the rotation, only the Y axis.
TransformPanel.PAST_ROT_Z: Paste the rotation, only the Z axis.
TransformPanel.ROT_I: Rotation step increment. Scroll or edit the input to change it.
TransformPanel.ROT_X: X rotation (global axis). Scroll up/down to change the value.
TransformPanel.ROT_Y: Y rotation (global axis). Scroll up/down to change the value.
TransformPanel.ROT_Z: Z rotation (global axis). Scroll up/down to change the value.
TransformPanel.PAST_SCALE_X: Paste the scale, only the X axis.
TransformPanel.PAST_SCALE_Y: Paste the scale, only the Y axis.
TransformPanel.PAST_SCALE_Z: Paste the scale, only the Z axis.
TransformPanel.SCALE_I: Scale step increment. Scroll or edit the input to change it.
TransformPanel.SCALE_X: X scale (local axis). Scroll up/down or type to change the value.
TransformPanel.SCALE_Y: Y scale (local axis). Scroll up/down or type to change the value.
TransformPanel.SCALE_Z: Z scale (local axis). Scroll up/down or type to change the value.
TransformPanel.MoveSubBuildings.tooltip: Enables or disables the movement of building upgrades, which are themselves separate buildings.
TransformPanel.COPY_POS_ROT.tooltip: Copy the position and the rotation.
TransformPanel.PASTE_POS_ROT.tooltip: Paste the position and the rotation.
